name: Wukong Fight in Kaoria
short_description: This is a single player action adventure game that includes mythological themed character actions and role-playing, You can use regular attacks and skills, spells, such as magic, celestial phenomena, and body fixing spells, to Fight and defeat the enemies you encounter.
detailed_description:
This is a single player action adventure game that includes mythological themed character actions and role-playing,

You can use regular attacks and skills, spells, such as magic, celestial phenomena, and body fixing spells, to

Fight and defeat the enemies you encounter.

[h2] Gameplay Introduction [/h2]

1. Basic operation: Use the keyboard and mouse (gamepad) to control the player's hero, embark on a game journey, and control the player

Move, jump, change of perspective, attack.

2. Spell skill release: Use the keyboard (gamepad) to specify keys to release skills and spells, such as clone summoning

Clone attacks on enemies, use body fixing techniques to control enemy behavior, and use the magic of celestial phenomena and earth skills

to increase the player's character's attack by doubling their own size Power effect, instant movement skill to evade enemy attacks.

3. Upgrade System: Eliminate a specified number of enemies, which can increase the player's hero level, health, attack power, and spells

Skill effect.

4 Enemy AI: Intelligent enemy AI enables enemies to have intelligent jumping, healing, and other AI functions, providing a superior gaming

experience.

[h2] Excellent graphics [/2]

Developed using UE5, making the characters and game scenes incredibly realistic, achieving advanced game graphics.

[h2] Hero Skills [/2]

Use different spell skills to match game characters and achieve different gaming experiences.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English*
*languages with full audio support
